message:
test(cli): add TestSendFlagNoOptDefVal for flag parsing fix

Adds unit test to verify --cc/--cod/--gmi flags work correctly when
placed before the prompt argument. This tests the NoOptDefVal fix
from commit 55a3164.

Test cases cover:
- Single flag before prompt (--cc, --cod, --gmi)
- Multiple flags before prompt (--cc --cod)
- Flag with explicit variant value (--cc=opus)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
